note: Per-skill index: for each observed skill/ability, lists every talent that modifies it, where it sits in the tree, its parsed stat modification, and a mock value showing that modification applied to a normalized baseline of 10. Each modifying talent is tagged with one or more lanes from laneTaxonomy (DMG/CRIT/CDR/CAST/HASTE/SPEED/HEAL/SHIELD/MITIGATION/RESOURCE/COST/DURATION/AOE/CC/ARMOR/SUMMON/MISC), plus cross-cutting behavior flags (PROC, STACK) that describe how the effect triggers rather than what stat it touches. A handful of nodes have unresolved "$xx" template descriptions in the source export - these are flagged rather than guessed at.

modifyingTalents.description:
Strike an enemy with frozen fury, dealing 1021 + 100% AP Frost damage and Burning 25 + 35% AP of the target's mana.

Damage dealt is guaranteed to critically strike against frozen targets.

Concentrated Magic.baseDescription: Increases your Spirit by 10% and reduces spell pushback suffered from damaging attacks by 70%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the range of Cryobrand by 10 yds.
Engrave your fists for 15 seconds, causing auto attacks to grant Earthen Fists for 10 seconds, increasing melee haste by 3% and the chance to trigger Weapon Engraving: Earth by 10%, stacking 5 times.
While Earthen Fists is active, critical strikes with Weapon Engraving: Earth now causes you to strike twice with your next auto attack.

Echo Rune.baseDescription:
Mark your current location with an echo rune for 20 seconds.

At the end of the duration or upon reactivation, warp back to the marked location and heal for 880 + 150% AP health.

Elemental Acuity.baseDescription: Increases all Fire, Frost, and Nature damage dealt by 10%.

Elemental Assassin.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell damage by 20% of your Agility, your spell critical strike chance by 10% of your Agility, and your hit rating by 5% of your Agility.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 10 Passive
Using Elemental Burst and Primordial Blast now grants you Frost Glyph. 

Frost GlyphUnleash: Deals 437 Frost Damage and slows movement speed by -30% for 4 seconds.

Using Elemental Burst or Primordial Blast while Frost Glyph is active now grants you a Flame Glyph.Flame GlyphUnleash: Deals 250 + 65% fire SP Fire Damage and an additional 750 + 30% SP Fire Damage over 6 seconds.

Using Elemental Burst or Primordial Blast while Flame Glyph is active now grants you Arcane Glyph.Arcane GlyphUnleash: Deals 276 + 18% arcane SP Arcane Damage to up to 0 enemies near the primary target.
Reduces the cast time of Elemental Burst and Glyphic Ruin by 0.5 sec and increases your chance to hit by 3%.
Damage dealt with Elemental Burst and Primordial Blast now has a 20% chance to reset the cooldown of Frigid Blast and make its next use within 10 seconds instant cast.
Increases the spell power scaling of Elemental Burst by 25%.

Level 40 Passive
Increases the spell power scaling of your Unleashed Glyphs by 10%.

In addition, dealing damage with Elemental Burst now increases the target's spell damage taken by 10% for 12 seconds.

You now gain a stack of Harnessed Leylines every 1 sec for until cancelled. After the duration, the stacks reset.
Harnessed Leylines (Proc)Increases the damage of your Runeblade and Elemental Burst by 3%, stacking up to 10 times.

Additional applications do not refresh the effect.
While Weapon Engraving: Fire is active, your Elemental Burst now deals 10% increased damage as Fire damage and your chance to trigger Weapon Engraving: Fire is increased by 5%.
Your Elemental Burst and Runeblade now have a 20% chance to instantly trigger your Weapon Engravings.

Elemental Strikes.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance with Fire, Frost, and Nature spells by 3% and your expertise by 4.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the effectiveness of Etching of the Dextrous by 20%.
Casting Eye of the Beholder now rapidly reduces the coldown of your Rune spells and Phase Out for the duration.
Reduces the cooldown of Fist of the Ancients by -2 sec whenever you use Runeblade or Primordial Blast.
Using Fist of the Ancients now increases your chance to trigger Weapon Engravings by 20% for 5 sec.
Increases the damage of Fist of the Ancients while you have Weapon Engraving: Fire active by 30%.

Harness the power of your runic tattoos, resetting the cooldown of Fist of the Ancients and allowing the use of abilities that require Runeshroud and making them able to be cast while moving for 8 seconds.

Using Elemental Burst or Primordial Blast while Flame Glyph is active now grants you Arcane Glyph.Arcane GlyphUnleash: Deals 276 + 18% arcane SP Arcane Damage to up to 0 enemies near the primary target.

Focusing Crystals.baseDescription: Increases your Magic Damage dealt by 6% and allows 60% of your mana regeneration to continue while in combat.

modifyingTalents.description:
Increases the spell power scaling of Frigid Blast by 50%, but the cast time is increased by 1 sec.

Additionally, Frigid Fusion now accumulates 10% more damage on the target.
Damage dealt with Elemental Burst and Primordial Blast now has a 20% chance to reset the cooldown of Frigid Blast and make its next use within 10 seconds instant cast.

Blast an enemy with frigid runic magic, dealing cond(gt(SPFR, SPA), 40+0+SPFR*0.65, 40+0+SPA*0.65) Frost damage and applying Frigid Fusion. Frigid Fusion (Aura)Accumulate 20% of your damage dealt to the target over 6 seconds.

After the duration, deal it as Frost Damage to the target.

Increases the spell power scaling of Frigid Blast by 50%, but the cast time is increased by 1 sec.

Additionally, Frigid Fusion now accumulates 10% more damage on the target.
Increases the duration of Frigid Fusion by 2 sec.

Using Elemental Burst or Primordial Blast while Frost Glyph is active now grants you a Flame Glyph.Flame GlyphUnleash: Deals 250 + 65% fire SP Fire Damage and an additional 750 + 30% SP Fire Damage over 6 seconds.
Increases the damage of Glyphic Ruin by 100% against Frozen targets.

Requires Frozen Target
Inscribe a rune of permafrost and unleash it on an enemy, incapacitating them for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players). Damage taken will end the effect. 

Affected enemies are considered Frozen.

Using this while in Runeshroud causes it to incur an -80% reduced cooldown.
Weapon Engraving: Fire now deals 25% increased damage against Frozen enemies.
Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Smolder and Primordial Blast against Frozen targets by 50%.
Critical strikes with Hoarfrost now cause your next spell within 15 seconds to cast as if the target were Frozen.

Glacial Rune.baseDescription:
Place a rune at the target location that explodes after 1 sec with frigid magic, dealing 128 + 30% SP Frost damage to enemies inside and freezing them in place for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players).

Damage caused may interrupt the effect.

modifyingTalents.description: Removes the cast time of Glacial Rune and Permafrost Rune.
Unleash your active Glyph effect on an enemy and deal 82 + 100% SP Elemental Damage.
Unleashing a Glyph now deals an additional 115 + 6% SP damage of the same magic school to all enemies within 8 yds of the target.
Blast an enemy for 67 + 41% arcane SP + 10% AP Arcane damage and unleash your active Glyph effect.
Unleashing a Glyph increases the damage of your Unleashed Glyphs by 5% for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.
While Glyphic Overload is active, your Glyphic Ruin is guaranteed to critically strike.
Reduces the cooldown of Glyphic Overload by -15 sec.
Reduces the cast time of Elemental Burst and Glyphic Ruin by 0.5 sec and increases your chance to hit by 3%.

Level 30 Passive
While Runic Tattoos: Fire is active, your Glyphic Ruin now has 30% increased critical damage.

While Runic Tattoos: Water is active, the cost of your Glyphic Ruin is now reduced by -50%.
Increases the damage of Glyphic Ruin by 100% against Frozen targets.
While Glyphic Overload is active, your Glyphic Ruin is guaranteed to critically strike.

Increases your spell critical strike chance by 25% for 15 seconds.

While active, the damage of your Glyphic Ruin and Primordial Blast is increased by 25%.

Glyphs of Power.baseDescription: Your direct damage dealt has a 10% chance to restore 3% of your maximum mana.

Granite Resolve.baseDescription:
Become hard as stone, reducing your Physical damage taken by -30% for 8 seconds.

Usable while stunned.

modifyingTalents.description: Granite Resolve now reduces damage taken by an additional -10%.

Guarding Rune.baseDescription: Inscribe a defensive rune beneath you in a 10 yd radius, summoning a barrier that causes allies within the radius to take -40% reduced Magic damage. Lasts 15 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description:
You now gain a stack of Harnessed Leylines every 1 sec for until cancelled. After the duration, the stacks reset.
Harnessed Leylines (Proc)Increases the damage of your Runeblade and Elemental Burst by 3%, stacking up to 10 times.

Additional applications do not refresh the effect.

Hoarfrost.baseDescription:
Slash in a frozen fury in front of you, dealing 7 + 33% AP Frost Damage to up to 3 nearby enemies, plus an additional 7 + 33% AP every 3 sec for 21 seconds.

Enemies hit by the initial strike are frozen in place for 3 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of Hoarfrost by 10% and allows its periodic damage to critically strike.
Critical strikes with Hoarfrost now cause your next spell within 15 seconds to cast as if the target were Frozen.
Increases the critical damage of Smolder, Hurricane, and Hoarfrost by 15%.

Hurricane.baseDescription:
Strike an enemy 5 times over 2 seconds, each strike dealing 125% Weapon Damage as Nature Damage, scaling with level.

While striking your target, your chance to dodge is increased by 100%, but you cannot use any spells or abilities.

modifyingTalents.description: Hurricane and Smolder now deal 50% more damage against enemies below 20% maximum health.
Increases the duration of Hurricane by 1 sec, allowing it to strike 2 additional times.
Each strike from Hurricane is now guaranteed to apply Weapon Engraving: Water or Weapon Engraving: Ice to your target while they are active.
Increases the critical damage of Smolder, Hurricane, and Hoarfrost by 15%.
While Weapon Engraving: Air is active, the damage of each strike of your Hurricane is increased by 30%.
Dealing damage with Hurricane now also reduces the targets Magic damage dealt by -15% for 8 seconds and dispels 1 harmful magic effect from you with each strike.
After Hurricane ends, your melee attack speed is increased by 15% and critical strike chance by 10% for 10 seconds.
After Hurricane ends, you may now use abilties that require Runeshroud for 5 seconds.
Increases the duration of Ice Rune and the stun effect from Palm Sigil: Earth by 1 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of Ice Rune by -20 sec and increases the mana cost by 50%, but reduces its range by -10 yds.

Ley Constitution.baseDescription: Your Armor contribution from items is increased by 30%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the duration of Ley Lock by 0.5 sec.
Your Ley Lock now interrupts 1 additional enemy near your primary target.
Removes the cast time from Ley Lock, but reduces its duration by 0.5 sec.

Ley Magician.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell damage by 30% of Spirit and 10% of your Intellect, and spell hit rating by 6% of your Spirit.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Leyfeed now steals 1 additional magic effect from the target.

Leyline Disturbance.baseDescription:
Increases melee and ranged haste of party and raid members within 100 yds by 10%.

Does not stack with similar effects.

Additionally, the duration of stun effects on you is reduced by -20%.

modifyingTalents.description: Your Marked: Runic Brand now stacks 3 times.

Mystical Etchings.baseDescription: Reduces all Fire, Nature, Frost, and Arcane damage taken by -15%.

modifyingTalents.description:
After using a Palm Sigil, the duration of your crowd control effects is increased by 20%.

Reduces the cast time of all Palm Sigils by -0.5 sec and increases the duration of your Palm Sigil buffs by 50%.
When you active a Palm Sigil, you are now guaranteed to critically strike for 20% increased critical damage for 10 seconds or your next 3 attacks.
Increases the duration of Ice Rune and the stun effect from Palm Sigil: Earth by 1 sec.
Your Palm Sigils now affect 1 additional instance of damage.

After using a Palm Sigil, the duration of your crowd control effects is increased by 20%.

Reduces the cast time of all Palm Sigils by -0.5 sec and increases the duration of your Palm Sigil buffs by 50%.
Removes the cast time of Glacial Rune and Permafrost Rune.
Casting Eye of the Beholder now rapidly reduces the coldown of your Rune spells and Phase Out for the duration.
Phase Out now increases your movement speed by 40% for 2 seconds.
Reduces the cooldown of Phase Out by -30 sec and removes its mana cost.

Casting Phase Out now summons 10 clones of yourself that run in a random direction for 5 seconds.

Rift Clones periodically explode dealing 1 + 19.5% AP Arcane damage to all enemies within 5 yds of them.

Level 40 Passive
Your Phase Out can now be used 1 additional time within 15 seconds before incurring a cooldown.

Power Engraving.baseDescription: Create a Power Engraving beneath you for 20 seconds, granting 20% increased Magic Damage dealt and 20% increased critical strike chance to up to 5 allies standing in the area.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 50 Passive
Gaining Power Overwhelming now also guarantees your next Runic Brand to critically strike.

Level 10 Passive
Using Elemental Burst and Primordial Blast now grants you Frost Glyph. 

Frost GlyphUnleash: Deals 437 Frost Damage and slows movement speed by -30% for 4 seconds.

Using Elemental Burst or Primordial Blast while Frost Glyph is active now grants you a Flame Glyph.Flame GlyphUnleash: Deals 250 + 65% fire SP Fire Damage and an additional 750 + 30% SP Fire Damage over 6 seconds.

Using Elemental Burst or Primordial Blast while Flame Glyph is active now grants you Arcane Glyph.Arcane GlyphUnleash: Deals 276 + 18% arcane SP Arcane Damage to up to 0 enemies near the primary target.
Damage dealt with Elemental Burst and Primordial Blast now has a 20% chance to reset the cooldown of Frigid Blast and make its next use within 10 seconds instant cast.
Casting Primordial Blast now reduces the cooldown of Primordial Pulse by -5 sec.
Increases the damage of Primordial Blast and Thaumaturgy by 20%.

Increases your spell critical strike chance by 25% for 15 seconds.

While active, the damage of your Glyphic Ruin and Primordial Blast is increased by 25%.

Level 10 Passive
Your Primordial Blast and Smolder now refresh a charge of Runeblade.

In addition, every 3rd Runeblade now restores 388 + 30% AP mana, increased by 20% while Runic Tattoos: Water is active.
Increases the critical strike chance and critical damage of Smolder and Primordial Blast against Frozen targets by 50%.
Your critical strikes dealt with Primordial Blast now have a 40% chance to strike an additional time.
Reduces the cooldown of Primordial Blast by -4 sec and it now refreshes 3 charges of Runeblade.
Damage dealt by Runic Brand now has a 33% chance to transform your Primordial Blast into a random unique elemental version of itself.
Reduces the cooldown of Fist of the Ancients by -2 sec whenever you use Runeblade or Primordial Blast.
Increases the spell power scaling of Primordial Blast by 30%.

Level 40 Passive
Your Runeblade and Primordial Blast now have a 35% chance to grant you Power Overwhelming, resetting the cooldown of Runic Brand.
Dealing damage with Primordial Blast now reduces the affected target's armor by -4% for 12 seconds, stacking 5 times.
Casting Smolder now reduces the cooldown of Primordial Fury by -10 sec and Zenith by -5 sec.

Primordial Pulse.baseDescription: Inscribe an area with runes for 2 seconds, dealing 23 + 30% SP Elemental Damage every 0 sec to up to 5 enemies inside.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Primordial Blast now reduces the cooldown of Primordial Pulse by -5 sec.
Each weapon enchanted by Weapon Engraving: Earth now reduces the cooldown of Primordial Pulse by -4 sec and increases it's damage by 15%.

Primordial Strength.baseDescription:
Level 20 Passive
Increases your spell damage by 25% of your attack power, your chance to hit by 3% of your Agility and your spell hit rating by 3% of your Agility.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the chance to trigger Replenishment with Runic Tattoos: Water by 10% and its mana restored by 25%.

Inscribe a rune of permafrost and unleash it on an enemy, incapacitating them for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players). Damage taken will end the effect. 

Affected enemies are considered Frozen.

Using this while in Runeshroud causes it to incur an -80% reduced cooldown.
Casting Eye of the Beholder now rapidly reduces the coldown of your Rune spells and Phase Out for the duration.
While Runic Tattoos: Air is active, the cooldown of Rune spells is reduced by 5% every 5 sec.
Reduces the cooldown of your Rune spells by -25%.
Critical damage taken reduces the cooldown of Rune of Guarding by 10%.

You now gain a stack of Harnessed Leylines every 1 sec for until cancelled. After the duration, the stacks reset.
Harnessed Leylines (Proc)Increases the damage of your Runeblade and Elemental Burst by 3%, stacking up to 10 times.

Additional applications do not refresh the effect.
Your Elemental Burst and Runeblade now have a 20% chance to instantly trigger your Weapon Engravings.

Level 10 Passive
Your Primordial Blast and Smolder now refresh a charge of Runeblade.

In addition, every 3rd Runeblade now restores 388 + 30% AP mana, increased by 20% while Runic Tattoos: Water is active.
Every 3rd cast of Runeblade now deals 30% increased damage.

Your runic tattoos flare up for 15 seconds, causing Runeblade to strike up to 5 additional enemies.

For the duration, your Runic Tattoos have 100% increased effectiveness.
Your Runeblade now has a 20% chance, and Warpdagger a 100% chance, to reset the cooldown of Smolder, and increase the damage of your next Smolder by 20%.

Level 50 Passive
Every 3rd cast of Runeblade now transforms your next Runeblade within 15 seconds into Surging Slash.
Surging Slash (Transform)Strike an enemy with a rune-infused weapon, dealing 110% Weapon Damage plus 60 Elemental Damage, bouncing to up to 4 additional enemies, dealing less damage with each bounce.

Brand an enemy, dealing 10 + 26% AP Fire damage with each weapon, and marking the enemy for 8 seconds.Marked: Runic BrandYour next Runeblade on the enemy causes a Runic Explosion, dealing an additional 121 + 18.5% AP Spellfire Damage to nearby enemies.

Level 10 Passive
Runeblade now strikes your target an additional time for 50% of the damage dealt with your offhand weapon.
Reduces the cooldown of Primordial Blast by -4 sec and it now refreshes 3 charges of Runeblade.
Reduces the cooldown of Fist of the Ancients by -2 sec whenever you use Runeblade or Primordial Blast.
Increases the damage of Runeblade by 20%.

Level 40 Passive
Your Runeblade and Primordial Blast now have a 35% chance to grant you Power Overwhelming, resetting the cooldown of Runic Brand.

Level 30 Passive
Smolder now envelops you in wind, causing your next 3 Runeblades to strike an additional time equal to 30% of the damage dealt as Nature damage.

Runes of Quickness.baseDescription:
Increases the spell haste of all party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, the range of your Glyphic spells is increased by 6 yds.

modifyingTalents.description: Disappear from sight, entering an improved stealth for 6 seconds and applying Runeshroud.
Your Warpdagger now incurs no cooldown if used while your Runeshroud is active.

Requires Frozen Target
Inscribe a rune of permafrost and unleash it on an enemy, incapacitating them for 40 seconds (8 sec vs players). Damage taken will end the effect. 

Affected enemies are considered Frozen.

Using this while in Runeshroud causes it to incur an -80% reduced cooldown.
Increases your critical strike chance by 10% for 5 seconds after leaving Runeshroud.
Abilities requiring Runeshroud can now be used for 3 sec and have no cast time after Runeshroud breaks.
After Hurricane ends, you may now use abilties that require Runeshroud for 5 seconds.
Casting Runeshroud now increases your movement speed by 75% for 3 seconds.

Harness the power of your runic tattoos, resetting the cooldown of Fist of the Ancients and allowing the use of abilities that require Runeshroud and making them able to be cast while moving for 8 seconds.

Runeslinger.baseDescription: Direct damage dealt has a 5% chance to increase your spell haste by 20% for 5 seconds.

modifyingTalents.description: Damage dealt by Runic Brand now has a 33% chance to transform your Primordial Blast into a random unique elemental version of itself.
Increases your critical strike chance with Runic Brand's explosion effect by 10%.

Level 40 Passive
Your Runeblade and Primordial Blast now have a 35% chance to grant you Power Overwhelming, resetting the cooldown of Runic Brand.

Level 50 Passive
Gaining Power Overwhelming now also guarantees your next Runic Brand to critically strike.
After activating Zenith, deal 900 + 33% AP Elemental Damage to your target and increase the damage dealt by your Runic Brand and Weapon Engravings by 30% for 8 seconds.

Brand an enemy, dealing 10 + 26% AP Fire damage with each weapon, and marking the enemy for 8 seconds.Marked: Runic BrandYour next Runeblade on the enemy causes a Runic Explosion, dealing an additional 121 + 18.5% AP Spellfire Damage to nearby enemies.

Striking at least 5 enemies with Runic Explosion now unleashes Wild Steam.Wild Steam (Transform)Stomp the ground in a 5 yd radius around you and release steam, dealing 128 + 25% AP Frostfire Damage to nearby enemies.

Runic Power.baseDescription:
Increases the all damage dealt by party and raid members by 3%. Does not stack with similar effects.

In addition, critical strikes now increase the chance for the target to be critically struck by your spells by 3% for 10 seconds.

Runic Tattoos.baseDescription: Reduces the resource costs of your spells and abilities by -10%.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases your movement speed by 15% and reduces the mana cost of your Runic Tattoos by -50%.

Your runic tattoos flare up for 15 seconds, causing Runeblade to strike up to 5 additional enemies.

For the duration, your Runic Tattoos have 100% increased effectiveness.
Increases the effectiveness of your Runic Tattoos by 50%.
Swapping to Runic Tattoos: Air now instantly dispels 1 movement slowing effect on you.
While Runic Tattoos: Air is active, the cooldown of Rune spells is reduced by 5% every 5 sec.
While in Runic Tattoos: Earth, you now heal for 3% of your maximum health every 4 sec and you become immune to knockbacks.
While Runic Tattoos: Earth is active, you now periodically gain Granite Shield every 20 sec.Granite ShieldAbsorbs 780 + 10% AP + 30% SP damage for 20 seconds.

While Runic Tattoos: Fire is active, your Glyphic Ruin now has 30% increased critical damage.

While Runic Tattoos: Water is active, the cost of your Glyphic Ruin is now reduced by -50%.

In addition, every 3rd Runeblade now restores 388 + 30% AP mana, increased by 20% while Runic Tattoos: Water is active.

Your melee auto attacks now have a 15% chance to restore 49 + 5% AP mana. 

While Runic Tattoos: Water is active, the mana restored is increased by 200%.
Increases the chance to trigger Replenishment with Runic Tattoos: Water by 10% and its mana restored by 25%.
Scroll of Magic now also increases the critical damage and critical strike chance of Unleashed Glyphs by 5% for 15 seconds, stacking 3 times.

Silencing Rune.baseDescription: Inscribe a rune in a 5 yd radius at target location that activates after 1 sec, silencing all enemies within for 10 seconds.

Smolder.baseDescription: Ignite your blade and strike an enemy, dealing 140% Weapon Damage plus 19 Fire Damage.

modifyingTalents.description:
Level 10 Passive
Your Primordial Blast and Smolder now refresh a charge of Runeblade.

In addition, every 3rd Runeblade now restores 388 + 30% AP mana, increased by 20% while Runic Tattoos: Water is active.

Casting Smolder now reduces the cooldown of Primordial Fury by -10 sec and Zenith by -5 sec.

Speed Rune.baseDescription:
Conjure a path of runes in the direction you are facing for 10 seconds, increasing the movement speed of allies by 70%.

This effect can persist for a short duration after leaving the runic path.

modifyingTalents.description: Increases the cooldown of Speed Rune by 30 sec, but it now applies stealth to allies who walk on the pathway for the duration.

Spellblade.baseDescription: Increases your Agility and Intellect by 10%.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting Thaumaturgy now grants you 25% increased movement speed for 5 seconds.
Increases the damage of Primordial Blast and Thaumaturgy by 20%.

Send out a gust of wind from your weapon that strikes nearby enemies in a 6 yd radius for 200% Weapon Damage as Nature damage every 1 sec for 3 seconds.

While active, you leave behind a Turbulent Spiral every 1 sec for 6 seconds.
Turbulent Spiral (Damage)Enemies in the area take an additional 97 + 13.5% AP Nature Damage every 1 sec.

Unbound.baseDescription: Reduces the duration of harmful magic and curse effects on you by -20%.

Unbound Energy.baseDescription: Increases your critical strike chance by 6% and your expertise by 8.

Warding Rune.baseDescription: Engrave anti-magic runes around you, removing all harmful magic effects and causing harmful magic effects to have no duration when cast on you for 6 seconds.

Warpdagger.baseDescription:
Toss an enchanted dagger forward in a line. Upon reactivation, you instantly teleport to the location of the dagger and deal 124 + 44% SP + 20% AP Elemental Damage to nearby enemies.

Usable while stealthed.

modifyingTalents.description: Casting or reactivating Warpdagger now removes all root and snare effects from you.
Reduces the cooldown of Warpdagger by -5 sec.
While stealthed, using Warpdagger now increases your Magic Damage dealt by 10% for 8 seconds.
Your Warpdagger now incurs no cooldown if used while your Runeshroud is active.
Your Runeblade now has a 20% chance, and Warpdagger a 100% chance, to reset the cooldown of Smolder, and increase the damage of your next Smolder by 20%.

When this deals damage, it triggers your Weapon Engraving.

Weapon Engraving: Fire now deals 25% increased damage against Frozen enemies.

Increases the damage dealt of Weapon Engraving: Fire by 20%.
Your Weapon Engraving: Fire now detonates after 2 sec and its critical damage is increased by 10%.
Increases the damage of Fist of the Ancients while you have Weapon Engraving: Fire active by 30%.
Each strike from Hurricane is now guaranteed to apply Weapon Engraving: Water or Weapon Engraving: Ice to your target while they are active.
Each strike from Hurricane is now guaranteed to apply Weapon Engraving: Water or Weapon Engraving: Ice to your target while they are active.
For 6 seconds, your runic tattoos flare up, increasing your chance to trigger your Weapon Engravings by 100%.
Increases the chance to trigger your Weapon Engravings by 5%.
Your Elemental Burst and Runeblade now have a 20% chance to instantly trigger your Weapon Engravings.
For 15 seconds, the next 10 Weapon Engravings you trigger will now deal an additional 348 + 30% SP + 20% AP Elemental Damage.
Using Fist of the Ancients now increases your chance to trigger Weapon Engravings by 20% for 5 sec.
Increases the effectiveness of your Weapon Engravings by 20%.

For 6 seconds, your runic tattoos flare up, increasing your chance to trigger your Weapon Engravings by 100%.
After activating Zenith, deal 900 + 33% AP Elemental Damage to your target and increase the damage dealt by your Runic Brand and Weapon Engravings by 30% for 8 seconds.

Striking at least 5 enemies with Runic Explosion now unleashes Wild Steam.Wild Steam (Transform)Stomp the ground in a 5 yd radius around you and release steam, dealing 128 + 25% AP Frostfire Damage to nearby enemies.
